Document:
# Roleplay Rule 5 ## Erotic roleplay is prohibited.
[italic][color=red]This does NOT include a lot of sexual speech, or joking. This rule only includes the outright ACTION. As long as you're just speaking, you're probably fine.[/color][/italic]
[color=red]If the conditions are violated, however, intent or reasoning is completely irrelevant.[/color] and you will be banned.
[italic][color=green]Just keep the roleplay appropriate for the age group that is allowed to be here.[/color][/italic]
